articles.headline: Lamine Yamal: 'Incredible' to see Lionel Messi still starring at World Cup
articles.description: Spain winger Lamine Yamal has said he is thrilled to see Lionel Messi defy time and continue to have a starring role at this World Cup.

images.name: Lamine Yamal [1296x729]
images.credit: Photo by Grzegorz Wajda/SOPA Images/LightRocket via Getty Images

images.name: Why Spain's substitutes were so important vs. Portugal

articles.headline: Keir Starmer hints at bank holiday if England win World Cup
articles.description: An England World Cup win could mean an extra bank holiday, Sir Keir Starmer has hinted ahead of a quarterfinal clash with Norway.

article.headline: Portugal eliminate Croatia at World Cup after dramatic late VAR call
article.description: Gonçalo Ramos headed a stoppage-time winner and Josko Gvardiol had an equaliser controversially disallowed as Portugal beat Croatia 2-1 at the World Cup.
article.linkText: Portugal eliminate Croatia at WC after VAR call

images.caption: Croatia were eliminated by Portugal after a controversial late VAR call.
images.credit: (Photo by Maddie Meyer - FIFA/FIFA via Getty Images)

images.name: Martínez: Croatia were offside, the technology is correct
images.caption: Martínez: Croatia were offside, the technology is correct

article.story:
Gonçalo Ramos headed a stoppage-time winner and Josko Gvardiol had an equaliser controversially disallowed as Portugal beat Croatia 2-1 in a thrilling World Cup round of 32 contest in Toronto.

Cristiano Ronaldo's first World Cup knockout goal had cancelled out Ivan Perisic's opener in a contest that saw four efforts ruled out for offside, including what would have been a goal of the tournament contender for the 41-year-old Ronaldo.

Portugal dominated the first half and could have gone ahead as early as the fourth minute when Bruno Fernandes was picked out by Rafael Leão, only to be denied twice -- first by a Dominik Livakovic save and then by a desperate defensive block.

Cristiano Ronaldo smashed a free-kick from distance into the wall and Renato Veiga headed over from Nuno Mendes' corner after being left unmarked eight yards out.

Croatia defended valiantly but were struggling to get out of their own half as Ronaldo failed to turn in Joao Cancelo's swerving cross after 30 minutes.

The half-time introduction of Igor Matanovic significantly improved Croatia as an attacking force and three minutes after the break Mateo Kovacic wriggled into the box but saw his effort deflected wide by goalkeeper Diogo Costa's foot.

Croatia took the lead in the 53rd minute as Perisic finished at the back post after Josip Stanisic's cross evaded Matanovic.

Three minutes later Croatia thought they had doubled their lead after Matanovic turned in Mario Pasalic's low cross, but the latter had mistimed his run and was ruled offside.

Leao thudded a long-range effort against the crossbar and moments later Portugal had a goal of their own ruled out. Ronaldo produced a moment of magic to bring Cancelo's cross-field ball under his spell and finish past Livakovic, only for VAR to rule that he had moved a fraction early.

Ronaldo's frustration did not last long, however. From a corner, Nikola Vlasic inexplicably wrestled Veiga to the ground and referee Espen Eskas awarded a penalty after a VAR review, which Ronaldo fired down the middle for the first World Cup knockout goal of his career.

Kovacic twice came close to restoring Croatia's lead in the 75th minute, bending a low effort against the post after a driving run from midfield then seeing his 20-yard follow-up effort tipped over by Costa.

With 10 minutes remaining Luka Sucic converted Kovacic's through ball, only for a third offside intervention to rule the goal out. Ronaldo was clearly unhappy as he was substituted for Rúben Neves moments later.

Veiga headed wide three minutes from time after another corner found him unmarked, while at the other end, Pasilic headed a Pericic cross wide with the goal at his mercy.

Portugal snatched it in stoppage time when substitute Goncalo Ramos rose highest to head home Leao's cross.

The drama was not finished there. Gvardiol prodded in what looked to be a leveller in the 12th minute of time added on, but the referee ruled that Matanovic had got the faintest of flicks before the ball found its way to Pasalic in an offside position.

keyEvents.text: First Half begins.
Rúben Dias (Portugal) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Croatia. Igor Matanovic replaces Ante Budimir.
Second Half begins Portugal 0, Croatia 0.
Goal! Portugal 0, Croatia 1. Ivan Perisic (Croatia) left footed shot from the left side of the box to the centre of the goal.
Luka Modric (Croatia) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.
Substitution, Portugal. Bernardo Silva replaces Vitinha.
Substitution, Portugal. Francisco Conceição replaces Pedro Neto.
Substitution, Portugal. Nélson Semedo replaces Bruno Fernandes.
Substitution, Portugal. Gonçalo Ramos replaces João Cancelo.
Goal! Portugal 1, Croatia 1. Cristiano Ronaldo (Portugal) converts the penalty with a right footed shot to the centre of the goal.
Substitution, Croatia. Mario Pasalic replaces Martin Baturina.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, Portugal. Rúben Neves replaces Cristiano Ronaldo.
Substitution, Croatia. Josko Gvardiol replaces Nikola Vlasic.
Goal! Portugal 2, Croatia 1. Gonçalo Ramos (Portugal) header from the centre of the box to the bottom right corner. Assisted by Rafael Leão with a cross.
Substitution, Croatia. Andrej Kramaric replaces Mateo Kovacic.
Ivan Perisic (Croatia) is shown the yellow card.
Delay in match (Portugal).
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Second Half ends, Portugal 2, Croatia 1.

stats.name: bigChanceCreated

stats.name: finalThirdEntries
stats.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside the final third into the final third

stats.name: penAreaEntries
stats.description: A pass where the ball moves from outside to inside the penalty area

stats.name: progressiveCarries
stats.description: Carries that significantly move the ball toward the opponent’s goal

stats.name: successfulFinalThirdPasses
stats.description: Total number of successful passes where the ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

stats.name: totalFinalThirdPasses
stats.description: Total number of passes (successful or unsuccessful) where ball ends in the final third of the pitch (excludes throw-ins, keeper throws, and crosses)

stats.name: touchesInOppBox
stats.description: Total touches inside the penalty area of the opposition

stats.name: blockedShots
stats.description: The number shots blocked by a defender.

stats.description: The number of clearances that stops the attack of the opposing team.

stats.name: effectiveTackles
stats.description: The number of tackles where the player wins the ball.

stats.name: inneffectiveTackles
stats.description: The number of tackles where the player doesn't win the ball.

stats.name: interceptions
stats.description: The number of interceptions.

stats.description: The perencentage of tackles where the player wins the ball.

stats.description: The number of clearances attempted.

stats.name: outfielderBlock

stats.name: timesTackled

stats.name: aerialsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is lost

stats.name: aerialsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: wonContest
stats.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: touches
stats.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

stats.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.

stats.name: aerialsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where the ball is in the air and possession is won

stats.name: duelsLost
stats.description: Total number of duels over the possession of the ball where a player loses the ball - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels for possession of the ball where possession was won (aerial won + ground duels won)

stats.name: groundDuelsWon
stats.description: Total number of duels where possession is won and ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges.

stats.name: duels
stats.description: Total number of direct player-on-player confrontations for possession of the ball (aerial + ground duels)

stats.name: groundDuels
stats.description: Total number of duels over possession where ball is on the ground; including total contests, total tackles, fouls, being fouled, dispossessions and lost challenges - doesn't include 'overrun' situations where the attacking player takes on an opponent but the ball runs away from them out of play or to an opponent.

stats.name: duelWinPct
stats.description: The percentage of duels won.

stats.name: turnover
stats.description: An unsuccessful touch. A player only touched the ball and lost possession – bad control

stats.name: wonContest
stats.description: Total dribbles where a team player beats an opponent – no over-runs or defensive 1v1s

stats.name: totalContest
stats.description: A dribble past a player is attempted (contests always involve two players) – it does not include 'overrun' situations (where the attacking player takes on an opponent, but the ball runs away from them and then out of play or to an opponent) or 'defensive 1v1' situations (where the attacking player attempts a dribble but is stopped by the defender but without a tackle occurring)

stats.name: touches
stats.description: Total sum of a player's or team's on-the-ball events

stats.name: aerialDuelPct
stats.description: Percentage of aerial duels won against total contested duels.
